v1.description: Formal thesis matrix with the current grounded defaults and full dataset coverage.

full_full_graph_dense.description: Full U-CaGNN with full-graph training on dense edges.

full_full_graph_knn.description: Full U-CaGNN with full-graph training on kNN edges.

full_full_graph_cagra.description: Full U-CaGNN with full-graph training on CAGRA edges.

full_cached_propagation_dense.description: Full U-CaGNN with cached propagation on dense edges.

full_cached_propagation_knn.description: Full U-CaGNN with cached propagation on kNN edges.

full_cached_propagation_cagra.description: Full U-CaGNN with cached propagation on CAGRA edges.

full_mini_batch_dense.description: Full U-CaGNN with mini-batch training on dense edges.

full_mini_batch_knn.description: Full U-CaGNN with mini-batch training on kNN edges.

full_mini_batch_cagra.description: Full U-CaGNN with mini-batch training on CAGRA edges.

lightgcn_full_graph_dense.description: LightGCN baseline with full-graph training on dense edges.

lightgcn_full_graph_knn.description: LightGCN baseline with full-graph training on kNN edges.

lightgcn_full_graph_cagra.description: LightGCN baseline with full-graph training on CAGRA edges.

lightgcn_cached_propagation_dense.description: LightGCN baseline with cached propagation on dense edges.

lightgcn_cached_propagation_knn.description: LightGCN baseline with cached propagation on kNN edges.

lightgcn_cached_propagation_cagra.description: LightGCN baseline with cached propagation on CAGRA edges.

lightgcn_mini_batch_dense.description: LightGCN baseline with mini-batch training on dense edges.

lightgcn_mini_batch_knn.description: LightGCN baseline with mini-batch training on kNN edges.

lightgcn_mini_batch_cagra.description: LightGCN baseline with mini-batch training on CAGRA edges.

dice_like_full_graph_dense.description: DICE-like preset with full-graph training on dense edges.

dice_like_full_graph_knn.description: DICE-like preset with full-graph training on kNN edges.

dice_like_full_graph_cagra.description: DICE-like preset with full-graph training on CAGRA edges.

dice_like_cached_propagation_dense.description: DICE-like preset with cached propagation on dense edges.

dice_like_cached_propagation_knn.description: DICE-like preset with cached propagation on kNN edges.

dice_like_cached_propagation_cagra.description: DICE-like preset with cached propagation on CAGRA edges.

dice_like_mini_batch_dense.description: DICE-like preset with mini-batch training on dense edges.

dice_like_mini_batch_knn.description: DICE-like preset with mini-batch training on kNN edges.

dice_like_mini_batch_cagra.description: DICE-like preset with mini-batch training on CAGRA edges.

full.description: Short alias for the standard full U-CaGNN recipe.

full_dense.description: Short alias for the dense full U-CaGNN recipe.

full_cagra.description: Short alias for the CAGRA full U-CaGNN recipe.

cached.description: Short alias for cached propagation on kNN edges.

cached_cagra.description: Short alias for cached propagation on CAGRA edges.

mini_batch.description: Short alias for mini-batch training on kNN edges.

mini_batch_cagra.description: Short alias for mini-batch training on CAGRA edges.

lightgcn.description: Short alias for the dense LightGCN baseline.

dice.description: Short alias for the standard DICE-like recipe.
